summary: Iteration 5 testing completed. All 4 features tested and working correctly: 1) Dashboard deleted leads display, 2) WhatsApp 5 per-event templates, 3) Quiz Exams module with public access, 4) Branch Admin task assignment bug fixed.

issues: Minor React hydration warning for table elements (span inside tbody) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard correctly shows deleted leads count separately from Total Leads and status breakdown
WhatsApp Settings has 5 per-event templates: enquiry_saved, demo_booked, enrollment_confirmed, fee_reminder, birthday_wishes
Each WhatsApp event has: enabled toggle, template_name, namespace, and variables list
Quiz Exams module fully functional with CRUD operations
Public exam page (/exam/:examId) accessible without authentication
Branch Admin task assignment dropdown working - shows users from their branch only via /branch/users endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Branch_Admin_Iter5 user and TEST_English_Proficiency_Quiz exam during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified. Dashboard shows deleted leads separately (not included in Total Leads or status breakdown counts). WhatsApp Settings API supports 5 per-event templates with individual template_name/namespace/variables. Quiz Exams module complete with public exam access at /exam/:examId - students enter enrollment number to start. Branch Admin task assignment fixed using /branch/users endpoint instead of /admin/users. MSG91 WhatsApp API is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.MSG91 WhatsApp API: WhatsApp notifications are configured but sending is MOCKED - returns success without actual delivery

features_verified.Dashboard - Deleted Leads Card: WORKING - Shows deleted count separately from Total Leads and status breakdown
features_verified.Analytics API - deleted_leads field: WORKING - /api/analytics/overview includes deleted_leads count and 'Deleted' in status_breakdown
features_verified.WhatsApp Settings - 5 Events: WORKING - enquiry_saved, demo_booked, enrollment_confirmed, fee_reminder, birthday_wishes
features_verified.WhatsApp Event Config: WORKING - Each event has enabled, template_name, namespace, variables fields
features_verified.Quiz Exams - List: WORKING - GET /api/quiz-exams returns all active quizzes
features_verified.Quiz Exams - Create: WORKING - POST /api/quiz-exams creates quiz with up to 100 MCQ questions
features_verified.Quiz Exams - Public Access: WORKING - GET /api/public/quiz/:id accessible without auth, correct answers hidden
features_verified.Quiz Exams - Copy Link: WORKING - Button copies exam URL for sharing with students
features_verified.Public Exam Page: WORKING - /exam/:examId shows exam name, duration, questions count, enrollment input
features_verified.Branch Admin - Task Assignment: FIXED - GET /api/branch/users returns branch-specific users for dropdown
features_verified.Branch Admin - User List: WORKING - Dropdown shows 3 users from same branch (Counsellor, FDE, Branch Admin)

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login - Super Admin and Branch Admin login
GET /api/quiz-exams/:id - Get full quiz details with correct answers
GET /api/public/quiz/:id - Public quiz without correct answers
GET /api/branch/users - Branch-specific user list for task assignment

bug_fixes_verified.Task Assignment Dropdown Bug: FIXED - Branch Admin now sees users via /api/branch/users endpoint
